title: EarthObjects
description: Objects in Earth's orbital neighbourhood (LEO through L2). Single file at data/earth-objects.json; per-locale editorial in data/i18n/[locale]/earth-objects/[id].json. The `alt` field is altitude above Earth's surface in km; for cislunar and Lagrange-point objects, alt is distance from Earth (the simplification chosen by the P05 prototype for log-scale visual placement).

alt.description: Altitude above Earth's surface in km, or Earth-distance for cislunar/L2 objects

alt_peri.description: Perigee altitude (km) — only for elliptical orbits

alt_apo.description: Apogee altitude (km) — only for elliptical orbits

period.description: Orbital period in minutes; omitted for L2 (object orbits the Sun, not Earth)

inclination.description: Inclination in degrees; omitted for L2

count.description: Number of dots to render (full constellations like GPS show as a sample subset)
